name: Peanut Brittle Bavarian Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in milk.
2. Heat the coffee to boiling; stir in the softened gelatin until dissolved.
3. Stir in sugar; chill until nearly set.
4. Meanwhile, whip egg whites and salt until stiff.
5. Whip cream until soft peaks form.
6. Whisk the gelatin mixture and fold in the egg whites, then whipped cream.
7. Sprinkle the bottom of a 6-cup ring mold with peanut brittle.
8. Pour the Bavarian mixture into the mold.
9. Chill until set.
10. Unmold and serve.
